scripts.check:frontend: node --check frontend/pond-client-v2.js && node --check frontend/pond-ui.js && node --check frontend/pond-canvas-v2.js && node --check frontend/pond-share.js && node --check frontend/pond-boot.js && node --check frontend/pond3d.js && node --check frontend/pond-runtime-v2.js
scripts.check:v2: npm run check:frontend && npm run check --workspace @eternal-pond/shared && npm run check --workspace @eternal-pond/worker
scripts.test:v2: node --test frontend/pond-bootstrap.test.mjs frontend/pond-client-v2.test.mjs && npm run test --workspace @eternal-pond/worker
scripts.build: npm run check:frontend && npm run build:v2
scripts.deploy: npm run check:v2 && npm run test:v2 && npm run deploy:v2:worker
